items.title: Jeff Rosenstock Booked For 311 Cruise 12 Years After His Petition
items.summary: Among the increasing number of bands who've headlined their own concert cruise, 311 are veterans. The genre-melding rockers have been working with maritime music festival promoter Sixthman since 2011, and today they announced the latest iteration of their 311 Caribbean Cruise. From March 10-15, 2027, the boat will travel to Ocho Rios, Jamaica, and Grand Cayman before returning back to its starting point of Miami.

items.title: Carmen Villain Announces New Album Memoria: Hear “Entre Nosotros”
items.summary: Carmen Villain? She's the baaaaad guuuuy. Duh. Oh wait. Wrong artist. Carmen Villain is Carmen Maria Hillestad, the Michigan-born Norwegian-Mexican musical artist specializing in experimental electronic composition.
